name: Rotkrautsalat (Red Cabbage Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon in a medium-size frying pan until it is crisp.
2. Remove the fried bacon and set aside.
3. Add sugar, vinegar, and wine to the bacon fat; stir and cook until the sugar is dissolved.
4. Pour this hot mixture over the shredded red cabbage.
5. Toss with vegetable oil, salt, pepper, and caraway seeds.
6. Sprinkle crumbled bacon over the salad.
7. Serve at room temperature.
